description: Values returned by the oMailGw instance

api-url.description: Base URL of the oMailGw API, including the /api suffix.

ui-url.description: URL of the oMailGw web interface.

mailgw-user.description: Internal mail gateway API user email for oMailGw.

mailgw-password.description: Internal mail gateway API user password for oMailGw.

fluentd-host.description: Address to which relay-side Fluent Bit clients should connect.

fluentd-port.description: Port to which relay-side Fluent Bit clients should connect.

fluentd-shared-key.description: Shared secret used by relay-side Fluent Bit clients to authenticate with Fluentd.
